summary: Completed comprehensive testing of SharePoint integration features for BIG Hat Presenter. All SharePoint functionality working perfectly including status endpoint, upload workflow, and dashboard integration with 5 round types.
passed_tests: SharePoint API configured with all 5 folder mappings (MC, REG, MISC, MYS, BIG)
Dashboard loads with 5 round type cards and SharePoint upload buttons on saved rounds
Created REG round with sample data and verified it appears in round list
Download PPTX button works for saved rounds (PPTX generation successful)
SharePoint upload returns success status with web_url and file_id
Round creator shows 3 action buttons: Save Draft, Download PPTX, Save to SharePoint
MYS form Q10 is properly locked as 'Theme?' and disabled for editing
BIG form has expandable answer lines (10 initial, can add/remove up to 15)
BIG form tiebreaker section with question and answer inputs
All backend CRUD endpoints working (17/17 tests passed)
End-to-end round creation, save, and SharePoint upload workflow
SharePoint status indicator ('On SharePoint') showing for uploaded rounds
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (20/20 tests passed), Frontend: 100% (all SharePoint UI features working), SharePoint Integration: 100% (all upload and status features working)
